title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 09 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 09 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 09 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/09/2022
DCE iron ore futures rose largely by 3.74% today, the main contract closed 720.5. some traders were active to sell, Some steel mills tended tobe wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. total transactions remained insipid.PBF at Shandong port dealt 755 yuan/mt; increased 5 yuan/mt over yesterday.SSF at Shandong port dealt 645 yuan/mt over yesterday.
